title: Login page not loading
description: Customer reports that the login page shows a blank screen after submitting credentials.

title: Payment failed but amount deducted
description: Customer was charged but order confirmation was not generated.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset email is not being received.

title: App crashing on checkout
description: Mobile app crashes when proceeding to checkout.

title: Profile picture not updating
description: Customer cannot upload or change profile picture.

title: Order history missing
description: Past orders are not visible in the dashboard.

title: Discount code not applying
description: Promo code shows invalid even though it is active.

title: Email notifications not received
description: Customer is not receiving order confirmation emails.

title: Shipping address cannot be updated
description: System throws error when trying to edit shipping address.

title: Slow website performance
description: Website takes too long to load product pages.

title: Refund not processed
description: Customer requested refund 7 days ago but has not received it.

title: Two-factor authentication issue
description: OTP code is not being accepted during login.
